creator: gerald@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Lorenzo Salvadore from comment #7)
> A patch is ready for trying to fix the issue

Very cool!

> applied only to GCC_DEFAULT for now as suggested by gerald@:

With the switch of GCC_DEFAULT to GCC 12 pending, it's probably now a
good idea to also consider that?

> Gerald: I do not think we need an exp-run for this change, do we?

Agreed, that would be too heavy. Building the port mentioned in
comment #4 here could be a good test, though.

Are you then planning to submit this upstream, too? Essentially share
the patch with gcc-patches@gcc.gnu.org (with a GNU ChangeLog). I can
help with that.
